members.name: _IntegrateForces
members.summary: Called during physics processing, allowing you to read and safely modify the simulation state for the object. By default, it is called before the standard force integration, but the [member custom_integrator] property allows you to disable the standard force integration and do fully custom force integration for a body.

members.name: ApplyCentralImpulse
members.summary: Applies a directional impulse without affecting rotation. An impulse is time-independent! Applying an impulse every frame would result in a framerate-dependent force. For this reason, it should only be used when simulating one-time impacts (use the "_integrate_forces" functions otherwise). This is equivalent to using [method apply_impulse] at the body's center of mass.

members.name: ApplyImpulse
members.signature: public void ApplyImpulse(Vector3 impulse, Vector3 position)
members.summary: Applies a positioned impulse to the PhysicsBone3D. An impulse is time-independent! Applying an impulse every frame would result in a framerate-dependent force. For this reason, it should only be used when simulating one-time impacts (use the "_integrate_forces" functions otherwise). [param position] is the offset from the PhysicsBone3D origin in global coordinates.

members.name: GetBoneId
members.summary: Returns the unique identifier of the PhysicsBone3D.

members.name: GetSimulatePhysics
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the PhysicsBone3D is allowed to simulate physics.

members.name: IsSimulatingPhysics
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the PhysicsBone3D is currently simulating physics.

members.name: AngularDamp
members.summary: Damps the body's rotation. By default, the body will use the [member ProjectSettings.physics/3d/default_angular_damp] project setting or any value override set by an [Area3D] the body is in. Depending on [member angular_damp_mode], you can set [member angular_damp] to be added to or to replace the body's damping value. See [member ProjectSettings.physics/3d/default_angular_damp] for more details about damping.

members.name: AngularDampMode
members.summary: Defines how [member angular_damp] is applied.

members.name: AngularVelocity
members.summary: The PhysicalBone3D's rotational velocity in [i]radians[/i] per second.

members.name: BodyOffset
members.summary: Sets the body's transform.

members.name: Bounce
members.summary: The body's bounciness. Values range from [code]0[/code] (no bounce) to [code]1[/code] (full bounciness). [b]Note:[/b] Even with [member bounce] set to [code]1.0[/code], some energy will be lost over time due to linear and angular damping. To have a [PhysicalBone3D] that preserves all its energy over time, set [member bounce] to [code]1.0[/code], [member linear_damp_mode] to [constant DAMP_MODE_REPLACE], [member linear_damp] to [code]0.0[/code], [member angular_damp_mode] to [constant DAMP_MODE_REPLACE], and [member angular_damp] to [code]0.0[/code].

members.name: CanSleep
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the body is deactivated when there is no movement, so it will not take part in the simulation until it is awakened by an external force.

members.name: CustomIntegrator
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the standard force integration (like gravity or damping) will be disabled for this body. Other than collision response, the body will only move as determined by the [method _integrate_forces] method, if that virtual method is overridden. Setting this property will call the method [method PhysicsServer3D.body_set_omit_force_integration] internally.

members.name: Friction
members.summary: The body's friction, from [code]0[/code] (frictionless) to [code]1[/code] (max friction).

members.name: GravityScale
members.summary: This is multiplied by [member ProjectSettings.physics/3d/default_gravity] to produce this body's gravity. For example, a value of [code]1.0[/code] will apply normal gravity, [code]2.0[/code] will apply double the gravity, and [code]0.5[/code] will apply half the gravity to this body.

members.name: JointOffset
members.summary: Sets the joint's transform.

members.name: JointRotation
members.summary: Sets the joint's rotation in radians.

members.name: JointType
members.summary: Sets the joint type.

members.name: LinearDamp
members.summary: Damps the body's movement. By default, the body will use [member ProjectSettings.physics/3d/default_linear_damp] or any value override set by an [Area3D] the body is in. Depending on [member linear_damp_mode], [member linear_damp] may be added to or replace the body's damping value. See [member ProjectSettings.physics/3d/default_linear_damp] for more details about damping.

members.name: LinearDampMode
members.summary: Defines how [member linear_damp] is applied.

members.name: LinearVelocity
members.summary: The body's linear velocity in units per second. Can be used sporadically, but [b]don't set this every frame[/b], because physics may run in another thread and runs at a different granularity. Use [method _integrate_forces] as your process loop for precise control of the body state.

members.name: Mass
members.summary: The body's mass.

values.name: DAMP_MODE_COMBINE
values.summary: In this mode, the body's damping value is added to any value set in areas or the default value.

values.name: DAMP_MODE_REPLACE
values.summary: In this mode, the body's damping value replaces any value set in areas or the default value.

values.name: JOINT_TYPE_6DOF
values.summary: A 6 degrees of freedom joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

values.name: JOINT_TYPE_CONE
values.summary: A cone joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

values.name: JOINT_TYPE_HINGE
values.summary: A hinge joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

values.name: JOINT_TYPE_NONE
values.summary: No joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

values.name: JOINT_TYPE_PIN
values.summary: A pin joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

values.name: JOINT_TYPE_SLIDER
values.summary: A slider joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

constants.name: DAMP_MODE_COMBINE
constants.summary: In this mode, the body's damping value is added to any value set in areas or the default value.

constants.name: DAMP_MODE_REPLACE
constants.summary: In this mode, the body's damping value replaces any value set in areas or the default value.

constants.name: JOINT_TYPE_NONE
constants.summary: No joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

constants.name: JOINT_TYPE_PIN
constants.summary: A pin joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

constants.name: JOINT_TYPE_CONE
constants.summary: A cone joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

constants.name: JOINT_TYPE_HINGE
constants.summary: A hinge joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

constants.name: JOINT_TYPE_SLIDER
constants.summary: A slider joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

constants.name: JOINT_TYPE_6DOF
constants.summary: A 6 degrees of freedom joint is applied to the PhysicsBone3D.

virtualMethods.name: _IntegrateForces
virtualMethods.summary: Called during physics processing, allowing you to read and safely modify the simulation state for the object. By default, it is called before the standard force integration, but the [member custom_integrator] property allows you to disable the standard force integration and do fully custom force integration for a body.
